items.summary: Baseball America experts Ben and Carlos address listener questions about evaluating genuine prospect development versus temporary performance fluctuations. The mailbag format covers methods for distinguishing sustainable player improvements from short-term statistical noise.

items.title: Scouting Derek Curiel: A Polished Pure Hitter With Power Questions

items.title: 90% of the Law
items.excerpt: As the war with Iran takes hold, the energy dominoes are beginning to fall.
items.summary: The article discusses geopolitical tensions and their impact on energy markets amid conflict with Iran. Energy supply chain disruptions are creating cascading effects across global markets.
items.pullQuote: energy dominoes are beginning to fall amid geopolitical tensions

items.title: Online age-verification tools for child safety are surveilling adults
items.excerpt: Article URL: https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/08/social-media-child-safety-internet-ai-surveillance.html Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47322635 Points: 6 # Comments: 1
items.summary: Age verification systems designed to protect children online are creating extensive surveillance infrastructure that monitors adult users. The technology raises privacy concerns as companies collect biometric and personal data to verify ages across platforms.
items.pullQuote: child safety tools creating extensive adult surveillance infrastructure

items.title: Ask HN: Remember Fidonet?
items.excerpt: Is it still somehow alive today? Is it archived anywhere? Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47321760 Points: 46 # Comments: 26
items.summary: A discussion thread exploring the legacy and current status of Fidonet, the pre-internet bulletin board network system. Community members are sharing whether historical archives exist and if any nodes remain operational today.
items.pullQuote: exploring pre-internet bulletin board network survival and archives

items.title: Yann LeCun's AI startup raises $1B in Europe's largest ever seed round
items.excerpt: Article URL: https://www.ft.com/content/e5245ec3-1a58-4eff-ab58-480b6259aaf1 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47321533 Points: 127 # Comments: 89
items.summary: AI pioneer Yann LeCun's new venture has secured $1 billion in seed funding, marking Europe's largest early-stage funding round. The investment signals significant confidence in LeCun's approach to artificial intelligence development following his work at Meta and NYU.
items.pullQuote: AI pioneer secures Europe's largest ever billion-dollar seed round

items.title: FreeBSD 14.4-Release Announcement
items.excerpt: Article URL: https://www.freebsd.org/releases/14.4R/announce/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47321499 Points: 39 # Comments: 3
items.summary: The FreeBSD project has released version 14.4, featuring security updates, performance improvements, and hardware compatibility enhancements. This maintenance release continues the stable 14.x branch with bug fixes and driver updates for the open-source operating system.
items.pullQuote: FreeBSD 14.4 delivers security updates and hardware compatibility improvements

items.title: 'Project Hail Mary' Review
items.excerpt: The most perfectly crowd-pleasing movie I’ve ever seen.
items.summary: A review praises the film adaptation of Andy Weir's science fiction novel as exceptionally crowd-pleasing. The movie appears to successfully translate the book's hard science and problem-solving narrative to screen.
items.pullQuote: Most perfectly crowd-pleasing movie combining science and storytelling

items.title: Trump Is Repeating Putin's Blunder
items.excerpt: Both men thought they could start easy, quick regime-change wars at minimal cost.
items.summary: Analysis compares Trump's approach to military conflicts with Putin's strategic miscalculations in Ukraine. The piece argues both leaders underestimated the complexity and costs of regime-change operations.
items.pullQuote: Both leaders miscalculated the true costs of regime-change wars

items.title: Tim Miller: Pete Hegseth Looks Completely Out of His Depth
items.excerpt: Tim Miller joined Nicolle Wallace to discuss Donald Trump’s latest comments on the Iran war and the chaos surrounding his administration’s messaging.
items.summary: Political commentator Tim Miller critiques Defense Secretary nominee Pete Hegseth's apparent lack of preparedness for the role. The discussion focuses on inconsistent messaging from the Trump administration regarding Iran policy.
items.pullQuote: Defense nominee appears unprepared for complex foreign policy challenges

items.title: Trump Says the War Is "Very Complete," But Also Just "Beginning"
items.excerpt: Sarah Longwell and Sam Stein give their takes on Donald Trump’s latest press conference on the war in Iran, where Trump seemed to declare victory while also suggesting the conflict is just beginning.
items.summary: Political analysts examine contradictory statements from Trump's press conference about the Iran conflict. The president simultaneously claimed victory while suggesting the military engagement was escalating.
items.pullQuote: Contradictory war messaging creates confusion about actual military strategy

items.title: Lindsey Graham Wants Trump to Attack Cuba and Lebanon Next
items.excerpt: Sam Stein and Will Saletan give their takes on why Lindsey Graham is suddenly everywhere celebrating the escalation against Iran and why even some Republicans are alarmed by his rhetoric.
items.summary: Senator Lindsey Graham advocates for expanding military operations beyond Iran to include Cuba and Lebanon. Some Republican lawmakers express concern about Graham's increasingly hawkish rhetoric and its potential consequences.
items.pullQuote: Senator pushes for multi-front military expansion despite GOP concerns

items.title: Bitcoin Line of Credit (BLOC), Extreme Oil Volatility, and New Fed Chair
items.excerpt: Breaking News in Finance and Bitcoin - 3/9/2026
items.summary: Financial markets face heightened volatility as Bitcoin-backed lending products emerge alongside extreme oil price swings. A new Federal Reserve chair appointment adds uncertainty to monetary policy direction amid these market disruptions.
items.pullQuote: Bitcoin-backed lending meets extreme oil volatility under new Fed leadership
